channel.title: Advisory Board on Vandana Verma
channel.description: Recent content in Advisory Board on Vandana Verma

item.title: OWASP Project Leadership and Community Roles
item.description: Public OWASP leadership references spanning project, podcast, and community work.

item.title: Chairperson - OWASP Global Board of Directors
item.description: OWASP board and governance leadership, including service as Chair and Compliance Officer.

item.title: Kubecon India 2024 - Program Committee: SOSS Community Day India 2024
item.description: Program committee role for SOSS Community Day India 2024 at KubeCon India, supporting open source security programming.

item.title: Black Hat Review Board — Asia & Europe
item.description: Review board role supporting Black Hat Asia and Black Hat Europe through conference submission review and technical program shaping.

item.title: Beyond Borders Advisory Board Member - SiberX
item.description: Advisory board role for SiberX Beyond Borders, supporting women in cybersecurity and global community-building.

item.title: EC-Council Advisory Board for CND
item.description: Advisory board role contributing practitioner perspective to the EC-Council Certified Network Defender ecosystem.
